description: Domain-agnostic agentic workflow config. Project identity lives in AGENTS.md at the repo root — not here.
portableSetupNotes: 1. Copy .cursor/ folder and AGENTS.md to the new repo.
2. Fill in AGENTS.md (project name, tech stack, structure, agent scopes).
4. Optionally add project-specific agent scopes in .cursor/config/worker-scopes.json under 'agents'.
5. Add domain skills to .cursor/skills/ and register in skills-manifest.json.
No changes needed to hooks, workflow-guard.py, skill-loader.py, or generic rules.
